name: AboveNet, Inc.
description: AboveNet, Inc. provides high-bandwidth connectivity solutions for business and carriers. Its private optical network delivers fiber-optic services including Ethernet, wavelength, IP transit, and dark fiber to major business markets in the United States and Europe. The company's infrastructure supports data-intensive applications for enterprise customers, financial institutions, government agencies, and media companies. AboveNet was acquired by Zayo Group in 2012.
